title: Airbnb tops revenue estimates, but Middle East cancellations rise due to Iran war
summary_full: Airbnb reported mixed first-quarter results after the bell on Thursday and warned of regional weakness due to the war in Iran.
summary_public: Airbnb reported mixed first-quarter results after the bell on Thursday and warned of regional weakness due to the war in Iran.
